label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes C_PIN column 0x05 (TryLimit) with -1 while the C_PIN table defines column 0x05 as uinteger_4. The provided type definition identifies uinteger_4 as an unsigned integer type with a 4-byte size restriction, so accepting a negative value with SUCCESS is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes C_PIN column 0x07 (Persistence) with value 2 while the C_PIN table defines column 0x07 as boolean. The provided boolean definition allows only integer values 0 and 1, so returning SUCCESS for value 2 is not protocol-compliant.
